name: Aupaircare and Intraxinc
message: [AI generated] AuPairCare and Intrax Inc. are sister companies. AuPairCare is a leading au pair agency providing live-in childcare services to American families in over 40 states. It pairs host families with international young adults who provide up to 45 hours of childcare each week. Intrax Inc. on the other hand, is a globally-oriented company providing a variety of educational and cultural exchange programs, including work and internship, teaching, and language learning opportunities.
